##MEMBER DIAG00
/********************************************************************/  00050000
/*                                                                  */  00100000
/*  Member = DIAG00                                                 */  00150000
/*                                                                  */  00200000
/*  Function =                                                      */  00250000
/*    This member of SYS1.PARMLIB is the mechanism through which    */  00300000
/*    IBM provides defaults for various diagnostic functions.       */  00350000
/*                                                                  */  00400000
/*  change-activity =                                               */  01100000
/*   $L0=DKB0029 ,HBB4430,920212,PDF5: Add defaults for             */  01150000
/*                CSA tracking and GFS trace.                       */  01200000
/*                                                                  */  01250000
/********************************************************************/  01300000
 VSM TRACK CSA(ON) SQA(ON)                                              01350000
 VSM TRACE GETFREE(OFF)                                                 01400000
